quick_skim.title: Bagpiper-TTS: Natural Language Guided Universal Speech Synthesis
quick_skim.abstract: Classical TTS systems typically rely on rigid input formats and predefined metadata slots, limiting their ability to fulfill flexible user requirements. This paper introduces Bagpiper-TTS, a universal speech synthesis system that deals with diverse natural language user requests. Given a natural language prompt, Bagpiper-TTS first reasons over the users' intent to derive a rich caption, i.e., a comprehensive textual blueprint encompassing both transcription and nuanced metadata. Subsequently, this caption guides the synthesis of the target speech. Our model inherently supports a broad spectrum of tasks besides classical TTS applications, including multi-talker, intent-to-speech, role-play synthesis, singing voice synthesis, and more. Experimental results demonstrate that Bagpiper-TTS achieves an 1.7% Word Error Rate (WER) on the Seed-TTS-Eval benchmark and match the performance of dedicated models in both LLM-as-a-judge and human subjective evaluations across multiple applications.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: universal speech synthesis system with natural language guidance, applicable as audio component in talking head generation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自然语言引导的通用语音合成系统，可用作说话头部生成的音频组件
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自然语言引导的通用语音合成系统，可用作说话头部生成的音频组件
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自然语言引导的通用语音合成系统，可用作说话头部生成的音频组件
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Bagpiper-TTS is a universal speech synthesis system that interprets natural language prompts to generate expressive speech, supporting multi-talker and role-play. It can provide the audio driving signal for talking heads.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: Bagpiper-TTS提出了一种自然语言引导的通用语音合成系统，能够根据用户意图生成包含丰富元数据的语音，支持多说话人、角色扮演等多种任务。该系统可作为说话头部生成中的音频驱动源，为后续面部动画提供逼真的语音输入。实验证明其在多个TTS任务上达到先进水平。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: Bagpiper-TTS提出了一种自然语言引导的通用语音合成系统，能够根据用户意图生成包含丰富元数据的语音，支持多说话人、角色扮演等多种任务。该系统可作为说话头部生成中的音频驱动源，为后续面部动画提供逼真的语音输入。实验证明其在多个TTS任务上达到先进水平。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: audio-driven facial animation for talking heads

quick_skim.title: ZONOS2 Technical Report
quick_skim.abstract: We present ZONOS2 8B, our latest TTS model, which achieves state-of-the-art naturalness, prosody, and voice cloning fidelity. We improve upon Zonos-v0.1 across scale, data, and training recipe. We scale the model from 1.6B to 8B total parameters (900M active) with a novel mixture-of-experts (MoE) backbone, improving inference latency and throughput. We expand our training corpus from 200K to over 6M hours using a new data processing pipeline, and we simplify our post-training and conditioning recipes to improve naturalness and voice cloning fidelity. We evaluate ZONOS2 8B on quality, speaker similarity, WER, and ZTTS1-Eval, our novel TTS benchmark, where it performs competitively with state-of-the-art systems while maintaining good streaming latency. We release our model weights and example inference code under an Apache 2.0 license on GitHub and Hugging Face.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: state-of-the-art TTS model with voice cloning, can produce audio for talking head driving
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 先进的语音合成与克隆模型，可为说话头部提供驱动音频
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 先进的语音合成与克隆模型，可为说话头部提供驱动音频
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 先进的语音合成与克隆模型，可为说话头部提供驱动音频
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ZONOS2 8B is a large TTS model with MoE backbone achieving state-of-the-art naturalness and voice cloning, evaluated on novel benchmark. Relevant for providing high-quality audio in talking head systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: ZONOS2 8B是一款采用混合专家架构的大规模语音合成模型，在自然度、韵律和语音克隆方面达到最优水平。它通过扩大数据和模型规模显著提升了语音质量，并引入了新型TTS基准。该模型可为说话头部生成提供高质量的语音驱动信号，并支持流式推理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: ZONOS2 8B是一款采用混合专家架构的大规模语音合成模型，在自然度、韵律和语音克隆方面达到最优水平。它通过扩大数据和模型规模显著提升了语音质量，并引入了新型TTS基准。该模型可为说话头部生成提供高质量的语音驱动信号，并支持流式推理。
